gap_summaries: [ultrathink] CRITICAL FIXED: Task 15 coverage command used `--source=<path-without-.py>` which silently instruments nothing → 0% false-fail. Switched to `--include=<path.py>` with documented dotted-module fallback.

[ultrathink] CRITICAL FIXED: REQ-15 mandates every test assert on .primary, .implies membership, AND .confidence. Seven matrix tests (crash/timeout/review_rejected/test_failure/parse_error/agent_refused/gate_defer) asserted only primary+confidence. Added `assertEqual(result.implies, ())` to each.

[ultrathink] CRITICAL FIXED: Task 11 mutated __all__ to include `classify_stream` before Task 13 defined the symbol, breaking strict TDD red→green ordering and producing an intermediate commit where __all__ promises a non-existent name. Split the mutation: Task 11 adds only `classify`; Task 13 adds `classify_stream` in the same commit that defines it. Both `test_all_export_list` updates land in the same commit as the matching __all__ change.

[ultrathink] CRITICAL FIXED: Under `from __future__ import annotations`, Iterable/Iterator are referenced only in stringified annotations, risking ruff F401 false positives on Task 16 step 3. Added narrowly-scoped `# noqa: F401` with explanatory comment to the `from collections.abc import Iterable, Iterator` line. Intent is now explicit and the noqa cannot be silently generalised.

[ultrathink] CRITICAL FIXED: Spec REQ-08 names `error_kind` but M01 ships `error_class`; the implementation defensively reads both, but no test exercised the `error_kind` injection path → dead defensive code, coverage drag. Added `test_error_kind_injected_attribute_is_inspected` that setattr-injects `error_kind="budget"` and asserts BUDGET_EXCEEDED. Locks in REQ-08's spec-named-field path.

[ultrathink] CRITICAL FIXED: `test_precedence_timeout_beats_policy_when_both_substrings_present` over-constrained the spec by asserting a precedence REQ-08 only lists implicitly. Renamed to `test_implementation_chooses_timeout_when_both_substrings_present`, added a comment that this locks an implementation choice not literally mandated by the spec, and surfaced the precedence-fuzziness in the plan preamble.

[ultrathink] CRITICAL FIXED: The substring rule `"test"` matches `"latest"`/`"contest"` etc., producing false-positive TEST_FAILURE classifications. Tightening would require adding `re` to the M07a import allowlist (out-of-scope for M07b). Added `test_substring_match_is_not_word_bounded_pinned_behaviour` that pins the substring behaviour with a regression test, plus a documented spec-level fuzziness note in the plan preamble so future tightening is deliberate not silent.

[ultrathink] IMPORTANT FIXED: Task 3 stub comments had swapped task-number references (`_classify_story_deferred` said "Task 7" but is implemented in Task 9; `_classify_tmux_crash` said "Task 9" but is implemented in Task 7). Swapped the comments to match the actual task ordering.

[ultrathink] IMPORTANT REMAINING: `_classify_story_deferred` does `attempt_count > 3` without isinstance guard. A setattr-injected non-int `attempt_count` would raise TypeError, violating REQ-06's no-raise contract. Defensive-only — no real M01 event exposes attempt_count today. Implementation may add `isinstance(attempt_count, int)` guard or document the contract; not blocking the plan.

[ultrathink] IMPORTANT REMAINING: REQ-10 "exceeds 3" is ambiguously worded; the plan's tests pin >3 correctly (4 trips, 3 does not) but no inline comment explains the choice. Documentation nit; tests are correct.

[ultrathink] MINOR REMAINING: Determinism gate currently exercises only at-most-one implies entry, so single-tuple comparison is trivially stable. Gate is forward-looking — guards future multi-element implies tuples from set/dict iteration drift. Acceptable as a regression backstop.
[ultrathink] MINOR REMAINING: `_classify_story_failed`'s `getattr(event, "error_kind", "") or ""` has a redundant `or ""` when the default is already `""`. Cosmetic.

[ultrathink] MINOR REMAINING: Helper generators in `test_classify_stream_does_not_buffer_lazy_iteration` / `_propagates_iterator_exception` annotated `-> object` while actually returning Generator. Under future-annotations this is never checked at runtime; minor nit only.
[ultrathink] MINOR REMAINING: Import block ordering relies on ruff's default `I001` sorting. The plan asks the implementer to accept ruff's order if it disagrees. No correctness risk.
[ultrathink] MINOR REMAINING: Task 14 Step 3 uses bash `time` which differs slightly on Windows git-bash. Output format variance does not affect the <2s budget check.
[ultrathink] M07a baseline verified green after edits (28 tests pass in 0.010s); plan grew from 1680 to 1777 lines after fixes; no source code modified — plan-mode only.
